problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
mechanism: Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins
hypothesis: The key to What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified is Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins — specifically Autophagy activation to — which would help 17,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
